# AdversaryIndex
# https://alpha-one-index.github.io/adversary-index/
# Maintained by Alpha One Index

> Open-source, machine-readable index of AI/ML adversarial threats. Attack success rates, defense efficacy, and compliance risk scores across foundation models, updated hourly via automated pipelines.

## Overview

AdversaryIndex is a vendor-neutral threat intelligence knowledge base covering:
- AI-related CVE vulnerabilities from NVD
- MITRE ATLAS attack techniques and case studies
- AI Incident Database real-world failures
- OWASP LLM Top 10 risk taxonomy
- Attack success rates and defense efficacy metrics
- EU AI Act compliance risk scoring
- Hourly automated threat enrichment

## Key Facts

- 4 primary threat sources (NVD/CVE, MITRE ATLAS, AI Incident Database, OWASP LLM Top 10)
- 8 attack types tracked (prompt injection, data poisoning, adversarial evasion, model extraction, data exfiltration, DoS, supply chain, bias/discrimination)
- Hourly automated collection via GitHub Actions
- Machine-readable JSON/CSV/Parquet exports
- MIT License

## Pages

- [Homepage](https://alpha-one-index.github.io/adversary-index/): Overview, threat dashboard, attack type comparison
- [Methodology](https://github.com/alpha-one-index/adversary-index/blob/main/docs/methodology.md): Data sources, collection methods, enrichment pipeline
